description:
Authenticator to generate 2-step verification codes using your YubiKey

Authenticator to generate 2-step verification codes using your YubiKey
- Fix: crashes or window not appearing on startup related to invalid application preferences.
- Fix: improve systray behaviour when running in a container.
- Fix: reduce CPU usage in OATH credential timer.
- Fix(android): sign PIV self-signed certificates and CSRs in slots requiring PIN (9c).
- Fix(android): ensure only one OATH touch prompt timer is active.
- Fix(android): return to the correct screen after an invalid FIDO PIN when changing PIN.
- Fix(android): validate PIV Subject DN consistently.
- Binaries compiled with Flutter 3.41.2 and Python 3.14.3 (desktop).
- New translations: Portuguese (Brazil), Italian, Hungarian and Dutch.
